en_title: 007 First Light Estimated to Have Sold 2.2 Million Copies, Generating $150 Million in Revenue
cn_title: 《007初露锋芒》销量220万份，收入1.5亿美元(约合人民币10.7亿元)
subtitle: 邦德首战告捷
opus_summary: 据分析机构Alinea Analytics数据，IO Interactive开发的《007初露锋芒》已售出约220万份，创收1.5亿美元(约合人民币10.7亿元)。其中PS5版占55.1%，Steam版33.1%，Xbox版11.8%。该作是IOI史上销售最快的游戏，首24小时售出150万份，MC评分87，IGN给出9/10高分。但游戏预算高达13亿丹麦克朗(约2.02亿美元(约合人民币14亿元))，尚未回本。此外，亚马逊游戏工作室在IOI交易完成后收购了詹姆斯·邦德IP，未来可能影响续作发行权。IOI希望打造邦德三部曲。

paragraphs.en: 007 First Light is estimated to have sold 2.2 million copies, generating $150 million in revenue.
paragraphs.cn: 据估计，《007初露锋芒》已售出220万份，创收1.5亿美元(约合人民币10.7亿元)。

paragraphs.en: Rhys Elliott, head of market analysis at Alinea Analytics, tweeted to say that the company’s data showed most of those early sales were on PS5. Elliott said 55.1% of sales were on PS5, 33.1% on Steam, and 11.8% on Xbox (Xbox console, Windows, and cloud combined).
paragraphs.cn: Alinea Analytics市场分析主管Rhys Elliott在X上发文称，公司数据显示早期销量大部分来自PS5。Elliott表示，55.1%的销量来自PS5，33.1%来自Steam，11.8%来自Xbox（含Xbox主机、Windows和云游戏）。

paragraphs.en: The only official sales data we have comes from developer IO Interactive, which said that 007 First Light had become the fastest-selling game in the company’s history , shifting 1.5 million copies in its first 24 hours. That means it’s sold faster than any Hitman game. The impressive sales milestone was achieved without the aid of the Nintendo Switch 2 version, which is due out this summer.
paragraphs.cn: 我们掌握的唯一官方销售数据来自开发商IO Interactive，该公司表示《007初露锋芒》已成为其史上销售最快的游戏，首24小时售出150万份。这意味着它的销售速度超过了任何一款《杀手》游戏。这一亮眼销售里程碑是在没有任天堂Switch 2版本助力的情况下达成的，该版本将于今年夏季推出。

paragraphs.en: The James Bond adventure is also the highest rated IOI game ever, with an 87 on Metacritic. IGN’s 007 First Light review returned a 9/10. We said: “Demonstrably obsessed with bringing the Bond fantasy to life in a way no one has ever managed before, 007 First Light is the best Bond game I’ve ever played.”
paragraphs.cn: 这款詹姆斯·邦德冒险游戏也是IOI有史以来评分最高的作品，Metacritic评分87。IGN的《007初露锋芒》评测给出了9/10的高分。我们评价道：「这款游戏显然痴迷于以前所未有的方式将邦德幻想变为现实，《007初露锋芒》是我玩过的最好的邦德游戏。」

paragraphs.en: So, a strong start for James Bond, but it looks like the game still has some way to go before breaking even for IOI. According to a report by the Danish Broadcasting Corporation, 007 First Light had a budget of 1.3 billion Danish krone (a little more than USD $202 million). Denmark's TV 2 said that makes 007 First Light the most expensive entertainment product in the country's history. IO had no comment to share regarding its reported budget when contacted by IGN.
paragraphs.cn: 因此，詹姆斯·邦德开局强劲，但游戏距离IOI回本似乎还有一段路要走。据丹麦广播公司报道，《007初露锋芒》的预算高达13亿丹麦克朗（略高于2.02亿美元(约合人民币14亿元)）。丹麦TV 2称，这使得《007初露锋芒》成为该国历史上最昂贵的娱乐产品。IGN联系IOI时，对方未就报道中的预算发表评论。

paragraphs.en: Adding complication to the question of whether 007 First Light will be successful commercially is that Amazon Game Studios has a stake in the game, despite the fact Amazon bought the James Bond IP after the First Light IO deal was done. Indeed, Amazon Games Studios has suggested it will publish all future James Bond games , whereas IOI self-published 007 First Light. Clearly, IOI hopes for enough success to continue 007 First Light’s story with a sequel . Indeed, the developer has said it wants to make a trilogy of James Bond games .
paragraphs.cn: 令《007初露锋芒》能否取得商业成功这一问题更加复杂的是，亚马逊游戏工作室在该游戏中拥有权益，尽管亚马逊是在IOI达成《初露锋芒》交易之后才收购了詹姆斯·邦德IP。事实上，亚马逊游戏工作室已表示将发行所有未来的詹姆斯·邦德游戏，而IOI自行发行了《007初露锋芒》。显然，IOI希望取得足够成功，以便通过续作延续《007初露锋芒》的故事。事实上，该开发商已表示希望制作一个詹姆斯·邦德游戏三部曲。

paragraphs.en: IGN's 007 First Light review returned a 9/10. We said: "Demonstrably obsessed with bringing the Bond fantasy to life in a way no one has ever managed before, 007 First Light is the best Bond game I’ve ever played."
paragraphs.cn: IGN的《007初露锋芒》评测给出了9/10的高分。我们评价道：「这款游戏显然痴迷于以前所未有的方式将邦德幻想变为现实，《007初露锋芒》是我玩过的最好的邦德游戏。」

paragraphs.en: Our 007 First Light Guide has all the Essential Tips and Tricks you need to survive your first assignments, plus 6 Tips for Mastering Stealth so you can stay out of sight. There are plenty of achievements to unlock and collectibles to get your hands on, so check our guide to All Collectible Locations to make sure you don’t miss out. For a helping hand with your missions, head to our in-progress Walkthrough , and our guide to all the Safe Combinations and Keypad Codes .
paragraphs.cn: 我们的《007初露锋芒》攻略包含完成首次任务所需的所有基本技巧和窍门，以及6条精通潜行的建议，让你保持隐蔽。游戏中有大量成就和收集品等你获取，请查看我们的全收集品位置指南，确保不错过任何内容。如需任务协助，请查阅我们正在更新的完整流程攻略，以及所有保险箱密码和键盘密码指南。

paragraphs.en: Wesley is Director, News at IGN. Find him on Twitter at @wyp100. You can reach Wesley at wesley_yinpoole@ign.com or confidentially at wyp100@proton.me.
paragraphs.cn: Wesley是IGN新闻总监。你可以在X上通过@wyp100找到他。可通过wesley_yinpoole@ign.com联系Wesley，或通过wyp100@proton.me进行保密联系。
